response.reasoning: Role requires 15 years experience, director-level IC, AI/cloud strategy focus, recognized AI expertise, and preferably Master's/PhD in AI. Candidate has ~16 years since 2009 (mostly software craftsmanship, full-stack, embedded). Recent re:cinq role touches AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, but only since April 2025 (~1 year). No demonstrated AI products/platforms at scale, no recognized AI expertise, no cloud architecture at hyperscale, no Master's/PhD. Strong engineering breadth (web, mobile, embedded, GIS, DLang microservices) and entrepreneurial signal via GISCollective founding. Lacks the principal/director-level AI strategy track record and thought leadership the role demands.
strengths: 15+ years of broad full-stack and infrastructure engineering experience
Entrepreneurial track record founding GISCollective open-source platform
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
concerns: No recognized AI expertise or shipped AI products/platforms at scale
Lacks Master's/PhD in AI and director-level IC strategy experience
Limited cloud-architecture depth beyond AWS CDK product work
response.justification: Solid senior engineer with broad polyglot experience and entrepreneurial credentials, but the résumé does not demonstrate the recognized AI expertise, shipped AI platforms, or director-level strategic influence required for a Principal Engineer AI Strategy role. Recent AI-adjacent work is too nascent to qualify as principal-level differentiation.
